name: CVR Recovery
description: Address Shopify conversion rate crisis. Optimize product pages, checkout flow, and launch DropShip Meta ads campaign to drive qualified traffic.
kpis: CVR目標3.0% | ATC率改善（現状5.3%） | チェックアウト完了率改善（現状28.9%） | ROAS ≥ 2.5x | CPM < $18
deliverables: PDP redesign, checkout UX audit, Meta ads creative library, A/B test framework

items.text: Add new Item to Collection — identify missing SKUs and create new collection entry
Add Collection description copy — write and publish description for each collection page
Add Omakase Set contents — update product page with full set details, items, and photos
Review all collection pages for missing products or outdated descriptions
Check sold-out products — hide or update availability on homepage and collection pages
Verify all product images are high quality and consistent across collections
Check SEO titles and meta descriptions for all collection pages
Confirm free shipping threshold ($350) is displayed correctly site-wide
Test add-to-cart flow on mobile for top 5 products
Verify checkout contact info step is working correctly (100% abandonment issue)

施策完了：PDP改善・カートクロスセル30商品・Goalify修正・送料表記統一・FAQ更新
